description_long: This is a single wedge sandal featuring olive green, textured synthetic straps that cross over the top of the foot and wrap around the heel, secured by a metallic buckle. The sandal has an open toe design, exposing the toes, and a closed back with a prominent strap and buckle for adjustable fit. The wedge sole is covered with a woven, espadrille-style texture, giving it a casual yet stylish appearance, and the outsole is made of a light brown rubber material with a subtle tread. The insole appears lightly cushioned and is colored to match a natural skin tone, likely for display purposes. The overall construction suggests comfort and support, suitable for urban walking on sidewalks or streets. The sandal is clean, intact, and shows no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: An olive green wedge sandal with textured criss-cross straps, a metallic buckle, and a woven espadrille-style sole. The sandal is open-toed, clean, and in new condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green textured straps, metallic buckle, and the full wedge sole with espadrille texture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open toe design, criss-cross straps, and the sandal's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous strap around the heel and the wedge sole's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back strap with buckle and the woven texture of the wedge heel.
